title: lithocarpus iteaphyllus
intro: Lithocarpus iteaphyllus, also known as the Taiwan Lithocarpus, is a species of evergreen tree that belongs to the beech family (Fagaceae). It is widely distributed in Taiwan and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The extracts from Lithocarpus iteaphyllus have been found to have potential health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antitumor activities. Lithocarpus iteaphyllus is typically used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
